title: Robotic coating application system and method
abstract: The specification and drawings present a robotic coating application system (200) and a method for coating at least one part with a robotic coating application system (200). The robotic coating application system (200) may comprise an enclosure (202) configured to receive at least one part. The robotic coating application system (200) may further comprise at least one robot (204, 206) configured to operate at least partially within the enclosure (202). The robotic coating application system (200) may also comprise a graphical user interface to display a model of the at least one part and allow a user to select a portion or subportion of the model for application of a coating. The coating may be automatically applied to the at least one part based upon, at least in part, the user-selected portion or subportion.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A robotic coating application system, comprising: at least one robot configured to apply a coating to at least one part; a graphical user interface to display a model of the at least one part and allow a user to select a portion or subportion of the model for application of a coating; and automatically applying the coating to the at least one part based upon, at least in part, the user-selected portion or subportion. 2. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, further comprising: a scanner configured to scan the part; and at least one processor configured to generate the model of the part. 3. The robotic coating application system of claim 2, wherein the at least one robot includes at least one of a turntable and a robotic arm configured to hold the scanner. 4. The robotic coating application system of claim 3, wherein the robotic arm includes an end effector configured to perform scanning or applying of the coating. 5. The robotic application system of claim 2, wherein the scanner is detachably affixed to the enclosure. 6. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, further comprising: a computing device configured to retrieve a model of the at least one part. 7. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, wherein the coating is selected from the group consisting of maskant, adhesive, and paint. 8. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, wherein the graphical user interface is configured to allow for user selection using a handheld device or touchscreen. 9. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, further comprising: using the at least one robot, while in a training mode, to select a portion or subportion of the model for application of the coating. 10. The robotic coating application system of claim 1, further comprising: an enclosure configured to receive the at least one part; 11. The robotic coating application system of claim 10, wherein the at least one robot is configured operate at least partially within the enclosure. 12. The robotic coating application system of claim 10, wherein the enclosure includes ultraviolet light curing capabilities. 13. A method for coating at least one part with a robotic coating application system, the method comprising: receiving at least one part in the robotic coating application system; displaying a model of the at least one part via a graphical user interface; receiving a selection of a portion or subportion of the model for application of a coating; and automatically applying the coating to the at least one part based upon, at least in part, the user-selected portion or subportion, wherein the coating is applied via at least one robot. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising: scanning the part via a scanner; and 

 generating the model of the part via a at least one processor. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein the at least one robot includes at least one of a turntable and a robotic arm configured to hold the scanner. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the robotic arm includes an end effector configured to perform scanning or applying of the coating. 17. The method of claim 14, wherein the scanner is detachably affixed to the enclosure. 18. The method of claim 13, further comprising: retrieving the model of the at least one part from a computing device. 19. The method of claim 13, wherein the coating is selected from the group consisting of maskant, adhesive, and paint. 20. The method of claim 13, wherein the graphical user interface is configured to allow for user selection using a handheld device or touchscreen. 21. The method of claim 13, further comprising: selecting, using the at least one robot, a portion or subportion of the model for application of the coating while in a training mode. 22. The method of claim 13, further comprising: receiving the at least part within an enclosure of the robot coating application system. 23. The method of claim 22, wherein the at least one robot is configured operate at least partially within the enclosure. 24. The method of claim 22, wherein the enclosure includes ultraviolet light curing capabilities.
